title: Autonomous Fleet — trace event
description: One JSONL line per state transition in the run ledger. The trace stream is the dashboard contract: vibe-kanban, Claude Code Agent View, and custom dashboards are interchangeable consumers. See trace.md TRACE EMISSION doctrine and references/run-archive.md for the archive layout. Schema is pinned at 1.0; breaking changes require a new $id.

schema_version.description: Pinned to 1.0 for this release. Breaking changes require a new $id and a synchronous lib + consumer update.

ts.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp with the trailing Z. Local times are REJECTED so dashboards can sort across runs without timezone arithmetic.

run_id.description: Run id from the archive layout (YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ-<mission>-<6-hex>). Must match the parent run-archive directory.

mission.description: Mission slug. MUST match the slug embedded in run_id.

primitive.description: The engine primitive whose state transition this event marks. Enum is closed: new primitives require a doctrine update first.

role.description: The role acting at the transition. OTHER is the escape hatch for orchestrator-only events with no human-shaped role.

status.description: Lifecycle status of the primitive at this transition.

task_id.description: Optional task identifier from the frozen DAG.

evidence_hash.description: Optional SHA-256 hex digest of the evidence backing this transition (e.g. ledger row + external fact).

cost_delta.description: Optional non-negative cost delta in the run's currency (USD by convention). Total run cost is the sum across events.

parent_event.description: Optional UUID-shaped pointer to a prior event (e.g. SPAWN_WORKER for which this is the COMMIT).

details.description: Free-form per-primitive payload. Consumers MUST NOT depend on any specific shape here; for typed fields, promote to a top-level property in a new schema $id.
